title: Replace <%= link %> with <.link> function component
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/nav_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.NavLive) that renders a top nav bar with three links: Home (~p"/"), Users (~p"/users"), and Posts (~p"/posts"). Use the <.link navigate={...}> function component for each, not <%= link %> or <%= live_patch %>.
